items.text: As you stroll through the celebration, Lenore steps onto the stage.

items.speaker: Lenore
items.text: Hello everyone, my name is Lenore, from the Minor Forbidden Archive of the Order of the Deep. Oh, sorry, now I belong to the Fabricatorium of the Deep… Wait, that's not right either...

items.speaker: Lenore
items.text: Hello everyone. My name is Lenore, and I'm an Acolyte of the Order of the Deep!

items.speaker: Lenore
items.text: I've traveled far in recent days and seen things I couldn't have imagined.

items.speaker: Lenore
items.text: While much of it was discouraging, I found treasured friends along this journey. And a gift from our ancestors—"The Nimbus Chorales."

items.speaker: Lenore
items.text: I began my journey inspired by this song. And now, at its end, I'd like to share it with you!

items.speaker: Lenore
items.text: I used to fear my role as an Acolyte. I worried that the doctrines of Salvation, Unity, and Ascension could be twisted again by the Threnodian to summon the Dark Tide.

items.speaker: Lenore
items.text: But I'm no longer afraid. I've come to realize these teachings were always the heartbeat of Rinascita!

items.speaker: Lenore
items.text: We once prayed for redemption to fall from the sky, hoping for a hand to lift us from suffering. Until Divinity showed us the path to true Salvation through Their departure.

items.speaker: Lenore
items.text: We once feared the dangers beyond the sea mists, and turned on our fellow Rinascitans with suspicion and pride. Until we reached out and rediscovered what true Unity looks like.

items.speaker: Lenore
items.text: Why did we ever forget? From the moment our ancestors braved the storms and stepped ashore, Rinascitan civilization already had its Ascension!

items.speaker: Lenore
items.text: Perhaps one day, perhaps tomorrow, Rinascitans will no longer need the Order.

items.speaker: Lenore
items.text: But I believe the ideals of Salvation, Unity, and Ascension will endure, like "The Nimbus Chorales."

items.speaker: Lenore
items.text: They will resonate forever in every Rinascitan's heart!

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: A humble celebration in the wake of disaster. A gathering to honor the birth of a new homeland.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: To the music of the "Nimbus Chorales," people sing and dance, grateful for the Sentinel's sacrifice and for the tireless efforts of their fellow men and women.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: Just as it was centuries ago, the people of Rinascita have become Rinascitans once more.
